long.connect: Connects you to a Server. If you do not give any arguments, connect will connect to localhost. Otherwise it will connect to the specified server.
long.set_name: Sets your username to the name you gave as an argument.
long.clear: Clears the screen, nothing more to say
long.quit: Quits the game, no more information here
long.help: Gives general information about the available commands. You can also give a command as an argument and get specific help for this command.
